purpose: Re-elicit the coarse-rating cohorts blind at tenths over their original live assignments; same agent ids, same blocs, same era -> supersede in place.
note: Whole-graph finer-than-half ratings ~24% -> 79%. Three non-rival nodes (n018/n029/n060, none in any antithesis set) moved contested->settled: their contested status came from belief-camp detection on the rater-agreement matrix, and the finer tenths ratings resolved apparent camps that the coarse whole/half grid had created. States 12/56 -> 9/59. The already-fine-grained haiku presentation cohort and any ref raters already at tenths were the ones re-elicited here (this graphs presentation cohort WAS the coarse one).
